flash-command: python3 -c "import sys,hashlib,subprocess,tempfile,os; b=bytearray(open(sys.argv[2],'rb').read()); b[12]=18; b[13]=0; b[-32:]=hashlib.sha256(bytes(b[:-32])).digest() if b[23] else b[-32:]; fd,t=tempfile.mkstemp(suffix='.bin'); os.write(fd,bytes(b)); os.close(fd); r=subprocess.run(['esptool','--port',sys.argv[1],'write-flash','0x2000',t]); os.unlink(t); sys.exit(r.returncode)" {port} {bin}
